⚡Quick start guide📦Template documentation🔑API key configuration🚀Deployment guide🔧Troubleshooting FAQ

Quick start guide

Get KILN running locally in 10 minutes. No credit card required.

Prerequisites

  • Node.js 20 or later
  • npm or pnpm
  • Git
  • A code editor (we like Zed or VS Code)

1. Clone the repo

Start with the template you want. We'll use the SaaS Starter for this guide.

git clone https://github.com/flumesaas/kiln-saas-starter.git my-saas
cd my-saas
npm install

2. Copy your env file

KILN needs a few environment variables. Copy the example and fill in your keys.

cp .env.example .env
Don't have API keys yet? Head to the API key guide to get set up with Resend, Polar, Trigger.dev, and PostHog.

3. Run the dev server

npm run dev

Your app is running at http://localhost:3000.

4. Fire KILN

When you're ready to deploy, run:

npx kiln fire

This will run migrations, generate auth tables, and prepare everything for production.

What's next?

  • Customize your template — swap logos, colors, copy
  • Deploy to production — see the Deployment guide
  • Read about all integrations in Template docs
